operator_directives_markdown:
# Operator Directives

run_id: C1-M1-PRES-20260409
timestamp_utc: {{TIMESTAMP}}
poll_started_utc: {{TIMESTAMP}}
reply_eligible_utc: {{TIMESTAMP}}
poll_close_utc: {{TIMESTAMP}}
poll_status: carried-from-C1-M1-PRES-20260406
operator: juanl

focus_directives:
- Focus on Part 1 of the C1M1 notes.
- For the slide presentation, prioritize the topical descriptions and scripts labeled as slides.
- For video production, look for directorial guidance that exists in Part 1.
- Use other material in Part 1 for context only.
- Use the secondary source image file only for the highest-level context: the three-course series, with this production creating assets for the first module of the first course.

exclusion_directives:
- No specific exclusions.

special_treatment_directives:
- Separate directorial guidance for video from all other topical, scripted, or contextual guidance in Part 1.
- Use the non-directorial Part 1 material to inform the slide-accompanying script.
- Use the directorial guidance in Part 1 to inform the video-related scripting.

checks.name: state:state/config

checks.name: state:state/runtime

checks.detail: run-constants.yaml present and valid for this bundle path

run_constants.frozen_note: Re-run of C1-M1 with double-dispatch deliberate variants, operator-set slide classifications (15 slides target), expanded motion budget. Source material identical to C1-M1-PRES-20260406.
